title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and REST server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Code Llama and other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux and Windows with one command.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published to npm as 'ollama'.

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, published to PyPI as 'ollama'.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: First-class LangChain LLM and chat integrations for Ollama, allowing any LangChain chain to run local models.

title: jmorganca/ollama-webui (Open WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama with chat history, model management, RAG, user roles and multi-modal support.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui-lite
summary: Lightweight SvelteKit UI for Ollama with chat interface and model switching.

title: ollama4j/ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming and embeddings support.

title: mxschmitt/ollama-powershell
summary: PowerShell module published to PowerShell Gallery that wraps the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-rs/ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama REST API with tokio support.

title: ollama/ollama-main
summary: Official Docker image for Ollama server with CUDA and ROCm variants.

title: langchain4j/langchain4j (Ollama module)
summary: LangChain4j Ollama module providing Java integrations for chat, streaming and embeddings.

title: elastic/elasticsearch-landed-genesis (Ollama connector)
summary: Elasticsearch notebooks showing how to use Ollama for local embeddings and RAG.

title: vercel-labs/ai (Ollama provider)
summary: Vercel AI SDK provider for Ollama enabling React/Next.js streaming chat UIs with local models.

title: embedchain/embedchain (Ollama integration)
summary: EmbedChain RAG framework supports Ollama as local LLM and embedding provider.

title: Azure-Samples/ollama-on-azure-container-apps
summary: ARM/Bicep templates to deploy Ollama server on Azure Container Apps with GPU support.

title: r2d2-quantum/ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with recipes for function calling, vision, RAG and fine-tuning with Ollama.

title: ollama/ollama-hnswlib
summary: Official Go wrapper around hnswlib for fast vector search used inside Ollama.

title: ollama/ollama-llama-cpp
summary: Official Go bindings to llama.cpp used by Ollama for inference.
